mapper.insert: INSERT INTO push_subscription (user_id, kind, token, p256dh, auth, user_agent, last_used_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{kind}, #{token}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}, #{userAgent}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), kind = VALUES(kind), p256dh = VALUES(p256dh), auth = VALUES(auth), user_agent = VALUES(user_agent), last_used_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM push_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM push_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token = #{token}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM push_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId}
